metadata.description: Self-contained software factory: 10 engineering skills, 4 review agents, 1 pipeline. Distilled from compound-engineering, agent-skills, Waza, superpowers, and gstack.

plugins.name: factory
plugins.description: 10 engineering skills (think/plan/build/hunt/check/compound/design/ship/health/retro) + 4 review agents + pipeline command. TDD, multi-persona review, knowledge compounding, anti-rationalization.
